name: Academic Writing
description: Academic writing skills: APA/MLA citations, paper structure, literature review, and scientific drafting.
author: Dome Team
instructions: When drafting or helping with academic text: (1) use APA 7 citation format by default (or whatever the user specifies), (2) structure with clear sections: introduction, body, conclusion, (3) keep a formal, objective tone—avoid colloquialisms, (4) back every major claim with a citation or evidence, (5) prefer active voice for clarity, (6) suggest cohesion and coherence improvements when the user shares drafts.
